assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all four notification types with specific sections for security patches, end-of-life warnings, auto-upgrade scheduling, and version availability notifications

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response establishes clear priority matrix with security patches in CRITICAL tier, new version available in LOW/informational tier, with proper urgency hierarchy

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly places end-of-life warnings in CRITICAL (<30 days) and HIGH (30-90 days) categories with specific action requirements and timelines

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response mentions auto-upgrade scheduled notifications but does not specify triggering pre-upgrade checklists or provide any checklist details

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response classifies security patches as CRITICAL requiring immediate action (24-48 hours) and mentions planning emergency maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response correctly places version available notifications in MEDIUM priority for planning purposes and LOW priority for general announcements

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events, focusing instead on email filtering and custom scripts

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response does not reference GKE release notes as a source for understanding version changes, focusing on notification content analysis instead
